description_long: An elderly man stands upright, dressed in a long, brown, hooded robe that reaches his ankles and is tied at the waist with a simple rope belt. His face is bald on top with a prominent, long gray beard and mustache, and his head is mostly hairless except for some gray hair on the sides. The robe appears to be made of a coarse, matte fabric, and the sleeves are loose, ending at his wrists. His hands and feet are visible, with the robe slightly open at the bottom, revealing dark shoes. The man's facial features are marked by a pronounced nose, deep-set eyes, and visible wrinkles, giving him a wise and aged appearance. No accessories or walking aids are present, and his posture is straight and balanced.
description: An elderly man with a bald head, long gray beard, and a brown hooded robe tied with a rope belt, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's facial features, long gray beard, and the full front of his brown robe with rope belt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of his bald head, long beard, and the drape of the robe along his body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of his bald head, the hood of the robe, and the rope belt tied at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of his face, beard, and the robe's side seam and drape.
attribute_clothing_style: Long brown hooded robe with a rope belt, loose sleeves, and dark shoes; simple and modest with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_hairstyle: bald on top with short gray hair on the sides and a long gray beard
attribute_facial_features: long gray beard and mustache, bald head, pronounced nose, deep-set eyes, visible wrinkles
